query: SELECT userId, LENGTH(tastytradeClientSecret) as csLen, LENGTH(tastytradeRefreshToken) as rtLen, SUBSTRING(tastytradeClientSecret,1,10) as csStart, SUBSTRING(tastytradeRefreshToken,1,30) as rtStart FROM apiCredentials WHERE userId=1;
